---
title: "A2NANCY Vignette"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{A2NANCY Vignette}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
devtools::load_all()
```

## Using `rmean()`

The `rmean()` function computes the arithmetic mean of a numeric vector.

```{r}
rmean(c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5))
```

## Using the `cars` dataset

The `cars` dataset contains stopping distances of cars at different speeds.

```{r}
head(cars)
```

```{r}
plot(cars$speed, cars$dist,
     xlab = "Speed (mph)",
     ylab = "Stopping distance (ft)",
     main = "Speed vs Stopping Distance")
```
